reviews.review_msg: I took CRIM 104 online, the lectures and material were very straightforward. Easy A if you put in the effort. I've heard a lot of good things about Barry and he's well respected in the crim community. Would definitely recommend this prof!

I don't know what happened with him between these 2013 and 2015 posts but Dr. Cartwright's lectures were incredibly boring and unhelpful. Course is too hard for a 1st year course and I'm a third year student. When asked to revise a grade based on an error in the system, the TA said she wasn't allowed and Cartwright wouldn't look over it. BADclass!

Worst grade I've received in a University course. Terrible TA who marks way too hard for a first year course. Expect to know even the most obscure of subjects for the tests. Better yet, DO NOT take this course or prof.
Say bye to your GPA, also be prepared to be belittled every time you email him.

man this class was bad. i'm a first semester transfer and I have to say I expected some more professional teachers than this... it's like she taught two classes.. the online tutorial gives you the meat and potatoes and then colleen just rambles on for hours, the class constantly clowned her... also why did she force us to read her stupid shorthand?

Colleen should not be teaching Criminology, she will make you second guess your choice of major. Her lectures are boring and pedantic. During one class she explained that she was a hard marker because "I need to get hired again next term". I seriously regret taking this class with her.

Hilary is a great prof. She is not easy but gives you many chances to do well. Hard, but if you attend all the lectures and take notes on what she says in class you are guaranteed to do well. The people who complain about her being tough are definitely the ones who don't listen to her instructions,she is crystal clear about how to do well.
At first I did not get the feel for Adrienne's teaching methods, but as I took more of her classes she became a lot easier to understand. Definitely in my top five favorite teachers.

Lectures were interesting and short. If you're in your first year I highly recommend you don't take this course. First year students were not ready for his tests and papers. 2nd year students will do much better in this course (A or B)  Midterm average 60% Term paper average 55%  Majority of class either failedgot a C. Two people received A.

Kind, genuine, and clear prof. Assignmentsexaminations are fair, you just have to put in the work. Presentation style is not the most exciting, but you'll certainly learn a lot from this course. Ignore the slides, they do you no good, with exception to the maps. Take thorough notes, the details come in handy.

loved the course. great textbook. readings were not that bad, about 1 chapter a week. 2 papers. the last paper is your final.  interesting lectures, informative lectures.  a good class to take if you like writing and arnt too bad at it.

He is the GOAT. Super hilarious lectures. You will learn a lot from him. Exams are fair - he just expects you to have paid attention in lecture and explain the basic material. Definitely an awesome class even though it's not required.
